_description: Manual player → team overrides applied at appearance-resolution time. Used for off-season trades/signings that Underdog's slate metadata hasn't reflected yet. Once Underdog updates their player data, remove the corresponding entry from `overrides` below. Keys must be EXACT 'First Last' name as returned by Underdog. Values are NFL team abbreviations matching Underdog's team codes (typically standard NFL codes — verify by spot-checking a draft page).
